flows.name: See the complete current marketplace
preconditions: The site is deployed from the current main branch

steps.expected: The page reports 17 plugins and 121 skills, and the catalog includes LoopKit and Harness Engineering.
steps.evidence: Rendered DOM assertion and production screenshot

steps.expected: Search receives focus and the registry narrows to LoopKit.
steps.evidence: Browser focus and visible result assertions

steps.expected: The search clears and the full registry returns.
steps.evidence: Browser input value and result count assertions

flows.name: Inspect and install a selected plugin

steps.action: Select Harness Engineering in the registry
steps.expected: The preview shows its description, featured skills, and exact install command.
The button confirms the copy and the visible command matches Harness Engineering exactly.
steps.evidence: Button feedback and command text assertion

steps.expected: The Harness Engineering detail route renders its skills and package facts.

flows.name: Use the registry on a narrow screen

steps.action: Open the homepage and navigate through the catalog controls
steps.expected: The hero, filters, registry rows, selected preview, and install commands remain readable without horizontal overflow.
